title: Cross Guild Changes the Seas
description: On pages 13–15, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Buggy, Unknown person #14, Sabo, Unknown person #15, Mihawk as New bounties and the Cross Guild reshape the world after Wano, while the Straw Hats sail away from the closed country.
scene: New bounties and the Cross Guild reshape the world after Wano, while the Straw Hats sail away from the closed country.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Let him have the target on his back.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We can always dispose of him if the need arises.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Listen up, ya bastards! We formed the cross Guild to prepare for the new age!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Let me introduce you to our new executives!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: We're moved to tears too; Captain!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: There is no need to brood...

dialogue.speaker: Sabo
dialogue.text: At least ve know SABO is safe!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Right! Nothingk can taint this! MIRACLE! Hee Haw!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll never forgive that naughty SABO for making us stew like that!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's meant to have supposedly happened, o.fter we split up, but I still believe in him.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Ah! That's exactly what I was thinking!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: You always beat me to the punch!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Quiet down, guys! You're so annoying!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm glad he's okay, but if he truly did murder King cobra...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...I won't forgive him. No matter what his reasons were.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: I am yours to command, Master...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We're picking up a call to Kamabakka Queendom!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: It could be the flame emperor!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Will we find out the truth...?!

summary: This part advances the Post-Wano World Shift through 41 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
